name: TalentAI Workspace
description: Save LinkedIn pages to your TalentAI workspace for lead research and recruitment.
__MUST_SET_KEY__: Paste the base64 public key from `extension/scripts/release.sh` (Part 1 setup) as the "key" field below, then delete this __MUST_SET_KEY__ line. Without a stable key, the extension ID rotates on every reload and auto-update breaks.
